1821970.name: Diaspora
1821970.description:
ABOUT THIS GAME


Diaspora is a 3D side scrolling adventure game.
The end has come to the world with the predicted disaster.
Explore a world full of chaos and despair and survive
Experience stages and various puzzle mechanisms with the theme of various places such as deserts, farmland, and cities.
Experience a new type of side scrolling adventure game centered on the story.


CHARACTERISTICS

a mural with hidden meanings

Imagine the meaning by looking at the murals in the village, not just solving puzzles.


Puzzle Played With a Partner

If you encounter a puzzle that you can't solve alone, don't worry.
You have a partner, 'el'.
1821970.supported_languages:
英语*, 韩语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
